title: Louder Than You Think
overview: Gary Young, drummer for indie-rock icons Pavement, injected a wild-card unpredictability into the band's breakthrough, lo-fi sound. But those same gonzo impulses derailed his rock star dream.

trailers.title: Louder Than You Think Trailer. Playing in US theaters Oct/Nov 2024
